summary: Completed testing of PR-8 Web Auth Cookie Migration. All tests passed - web frontend no longer uses localStorage for token storage, relies entirely on httpOnly cookie session + /api/auth/me bootstrap. Login, page refresh session persistence, logout, and route protection all working correctly.

minor.issue: 500/400 errors observed in console logs during testing - not auth-related, appear to be pre-existing issues unrelated to PR-8 scope

passed_tests: ✅ Backend pytest: 14/14 tests passed in test_web_auth_cookie_compat_comprehensive.py
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/login returns auth_transport: cookie_compat with X-Client-Platform: web
✅ Backend API: Login sets httpOnly cookies (acenta_access, acenta_refresh)
✅ Backend API: GET /api/auth/me works with cookie session (no Authorization header needed)
✅ Backend API: POST /api/auth/logout clears session - /auth/me returns 401 after logout
✅ Backend API: B2B login works with cookie session (agent@acenta.test)
✅ Backend API: GET /api/b2b/me works with cookie session
✅ Frontend: Login page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Web login succeeds and redirects to /app/admin/agencies
✅ Frontend: No JWT tokens stored in localStorage (only acenta_user, acenta_tenant_id, acenta_auth_transport)
✅ Frontend: Page refresh preserves session via cookie bootstrap (/api/auth/me)
✅ Frontend: Logout redirects to /login
✅ Frontend: Protected routes correctly redirect to /login after logout
✅ Frontend: B2B login page loads correctly
✅ Frontend: B2B login succeeds and redirects to /b2b/bookings
✅ Frontend: B2B login also doesn't store JWT tokens in localStorage
✅ Code Review: getToken()/setToken()/getRefreshToken()/setRefreshToken() are no-op functions returning empty strings
✅ Code Review: api.js actively deletes Authorization headers from requests
✅ Code Review: withCredentials: true is set for cookie-based auth
✅ Code Review: No direct localStorage.setItem('token'...) calls in frontend code
critical_code_review_comments: authSession.js: getToken(), setToken(), getRefreshToken(), setRefreshToken() are properly converted to no-ops returning empty strings
api.js: withCredentials: true ensures cookies are sent with requests
api.js: Authorization headers are actively deleted to prevent any token injection
cookieAuthCompat.js: bootstrapAuthSession() correctly uses /auth/me -> /auth/refresh fallback pattern
useAuth.js: useLogin().onSuccess calls persistLoginSession() which only stores user/tenant_id/auth_transport (no tokens)
SignupPage.jsx: Uses useLogin() mutation which handles session via cookies, not localStorage tokens

success_rate.backend: 100% (14/14 backend tests + 7 curl API tests passed)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (16/16 Playwright UI + code review checks passed)

seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: PR-8 Web Auth Cookie Migration testing complete. Key validations: (1) localStorage no longer stores JWT tokens, (2) auth relies on httpOnly cookies, (3) /api/auth/me bootstrap restores session on page refresh, (4) logout clears session and protects routes. Backend auth/session logic unchanged per PR scope. Note: Some 500/400 errors observed in console for admin endpoints - these are pre-existing issues unrelated to auth migration.
